questions.question: What does the setup() function do in an Arduino program?
options: Runs once when the board powers on, used for initialization
Runs continuously in a loop forever
Sets the clock speed of the Arduino

questions.question: What does pinMode(13, OUTPUT) do?
options: Configures pin 13 to send signals out

questions.question: What voltage does a digital HIGH signal represent on an Arduino Uno?
If you call delay(1000), how long does the Arduino pause?
To blink an LED at 2Hz (two full cycles per second), what delay values would you use?
options: delay(1000) for on, delay(1000) for off
delay(500) for on, delay(500) for off
delay(250) for on, delay(250) for off
delay(100) for on, delay(100) for off
